TextView.android:text:
Weekly Health & Wellness Goals

1. Consistent Hydration
Aim to drink at least 8 glasses of water every single day.

2. Active Minutes
Complete at least 150 minutes of moderate exercise this week.

3. Balanced Nutrition
Include a serving of green vegetables with every dinner.

4. Better Sleep
Try to get 7-8 hours of restful sleep each night.

5. Mental Clarity
Dedicate 10 minutes daily to meditation or deep breathing.

6. Limit Screen Time
Reduce non-work related screen time by one hour daily.

7. Step Count
Reach a target of 10,000 steps at least 5 days this week.

8. Home Cooking
Prepare at least 5 healthy meals at home instead of eating out.

9. Morning Routine
Start each day with a healthy breakfast and light stretching.

10. Weekend Recovery
Spend time outdoors on the weekend to recharge your energy.
